what_it_does: Defines the web app manifest for Design DNA with app names, description, root launch scope, standalone display mode, shared background/theme color, and two PNG icon entries.
observations: App name is "Design DNA" and short name is "DNA".
Description reads "The house — gallery, bench, map, almanac."
start_url and scope both point to the site root.
Icons are declared at 192x192 and 512x512 PNG sizes under /assets/icons/.
standouts: The manifest uses a warm off-white color consistently for background and theme.
The description frames the app as a house with gallery, bench, map, and almanac roles.
conventions: Follows standard web manifest JSON field naming.
Uses root-relative URLs for launch and icon paths.
Keeps icon declarations explicit with src, sizes, and type.
Uses a compact one-space indentation style.
concerns: No maskable icon purpose is declared.
No manifest id field is present.
notes: This file supplies the install and presentation metadata for the Design DNA web app shell.
questions: Should the icons also include maskable variants?
Is the root start_url intended for every install context?
purpose_vs_actual: The stated app identity and description align with a manifest that exposes Design DNA as a standalone web app; the file contains shell metadata rather than the gallery, bench, map, or almanac content itself.
intention_signals: It seems intended to make Design DNA present as a standalone, installable web experience with a restrained visual identity and concise conceptual framing.
novelty: The description uses a poetic house metaphor inside otherwise standard manifest metadata.
contribution: Provides portable app identity, launch behavior, display mode, theme color, and icon metadata that a fused system would keep as web app shell configuration.
summary_for_embedding: A webmanifest.json file defining Design DNA as a standalone root-scoped web app with warm off-white theme metadata and 192/512 PNG icons.
intention_for_embedding: This was for packaging the Design DNA experience as an installable standalone app with concise house-themed identity metadata.
